items.title: Jony Ive’s funky Ferrari
items.summary: Most people will never own, drive, or even sit inside a Ferrari Luce. (If you can, or do… hit us up.) items.title: OpenAI gives Japan’s megabanks its newest model for cyber defence
items.summary: GPT-5.5-Cyber will reach MUFG, SMBC and Mizuho through a verified-defender programme, the finance minister said, as Tokyo treats frontier AI as both threat and shield. items.title: Hundreds of prolific Wikipedia editors are threatening to go on strike
items.summary: Wikipedia is one of the last bastions of trust on the internet. items.title: This AI startup will clean your home for free to train future robots
items.summary: AI training startup Shift wants to clean your home for free. items.title: Norway’s $2.3tn fund backs a human-rights review at Palantir
